app.name: Rulyx
onboarding.title: Bluesky moderation made easy (AR)
onboarding.subtitle: Free  ·  Open source  ·  No ads  ·  No tracking (AR)
onboarding.moderation.title: Moderation (AR)
onboarding.moderation.desc: Browse lists, search for actors, import or export members, and compare lists. (AR)
onboarding.profile.title: Profile (AR)
onboarding.profile.desc: Inspect profiles, view labels and stats, and perform moderation actions. (AR)
onboarding.settings.title: Settings (AR)
onboarding.settings.desc: Manage accounts, clear cache, and review data classification. (AR)
onboarding.info.title: Info (AR)
onboarding.info.desc: Learn about the app, review workflows, and access privacy information. (AR)
onboarding.accounts.title: Accounts (AR)
onboarding.accounts.desc: Switch between saved accounts, add new accounts, and manage account labels. (AR)

account.switcher.hint: Opens account switcher to change or manage accounts (AR)
settings.title: Settings (AR)
settings.clear_cache.confirm: Clear cached network and image data? (AR)
settings.clear_cache.message: Saved accounts and app passwords will not be removed. (AR)
info.keychain.title: Keychain-secured (AR)
info.keychain.desc: Account secrets never leave your device. All API calls go directly to your Bluesky PDS. (AR)
info.clearsky.desc: Blocking and blocked-by data is provided by ClearSky. ClearSky indexes block records from the Bluesky firehose and makes them available via a public API. No authentication is required. (AR)
info.legal.author: Author (AR)
lists.no_account.title: No Active Account (AR)

pending.empty.desc: Long-running operations like blocking followers will appear here. (AR)
account.add.title: Add Account (AR)

account.no_accounts.desc: Add your first Bluesky account to begin. (AR)
list.detail.delete_message: This permanently deletes the list and all its members. This cannot be undone. (AR)

list.members.no_matches_desc: No existing members match the current filter. (AR)

profile.save_search.hint: Saves this search for quick access later (AR)
profile.add_account_first: Add and select an account first. (AR)
profile.no_lists: No owned lists available for membership comparison. (AR)
profile.no_starter_packs: No owned starter packs available for membership comparison. (AR)
profile.open_bluesky.label: Open in Bluesky (AR)
profile.open_bluesky.hint: Opens this profile in the official Bluesky app or web interface (AR)
profile.open_controls.label: Open Moderation Controls (AR)
profile.open_controls.hint: Opens a detail view with block, mute, and list membership actions (AR)
profile.result.hint: Shows detailed profile information for this account (AR)
profile.media.title: الوسائط

list.detail.subscribe.label: Subscribe (AR)
list.detail.edit.label: Edit (AR)
list.detail.delete.label: Delete (AR)
list.detail.remove_message: This removes {count} selected member(s) from the list. (AR)
list.members.filter_accessibility: Filter members by handle or name (AR)
list.compare.title: Compare and Transfer (AR)
list.compare.no_lists_desc: Create additional lists to use comparison and transfer tools. (AR)
list.compare.help_overlap: Overlap: members present in both lists. (AR)
list.compare.help_only_current: Only in current list: members unique to this list. (AR)
list.compare.help_only_other: Only in comparison list: members in the other list but not this one. (AR)
list.compare.help_copy: Copy adds selected members from the compared list to this list without affecting the source. (AR)
list.compare.help_move: Move transfers selected members from this list to the other, removing them from this list. (AR)
list.snapshot.title: Snapshot History (AR)
list.snapshot.no_changes: No membership changes in this comparison. (AR)
list.snapshot.help_1: Snapshots capture the full membership of this list at a point in time. (AR)
list.snapshot.help_2: Use the pickers to compare two historical snapshots and see what changed. (AR)
list.snapshot.help_3: New snapshots are created automatically after bulk operations. (AR)
list.snapshot.help_4: The diff shows exactly which members were added or removed between snapshots. (AR)
list.snapshot.help_5: Snapshots are stored locally and tied to this workspace. (AR)
list.import.title: Import Handles (AR)
list.import.paste_section: Paste Handles, DIDs, or Profile URLs (AR)
list.import.help_3: CSV rows with handles, DIDs, or profile URLs (AR)
list.import.help_5: Duplicate and already-present entries will be detected before import. (AR)
list.import_preview.title: Import Review (AR)
list.import_preview.skip_note: Already-present accounts will be skipped during import. (AR)
list.import_preview.help_ready: Ready: These accounts will be added to the list. (AR)
list.import_preview.help_already: Already in List: These accounts are already members and will be skipped. (AR)
list.import_preview.help_duplicate: Duplicate: Multiple entries in your import resolve to the same account. (AR)
list.import_preview.help_unresolved: Unresolved: These identifiers could not be found on Bluesky. (AR)
list.import_preview.help_write: Importing writes to the live Bluesky list immediately. (AR)
list.edit.title: Edit List (AR)
rel.block_message: Blocking prevents interaction and is treated as a destructive moderation action. (AR)
list.subscribe.error_uri: Enter a list AT URI or URL. (AR)

settings.icloud.enabled_footer: Account handles and labels sync across your devices. App passwords stay on each device for security.
settings.icloud.disabled_footer: Enable to keep your account configuration consistent across devices.
settings.biometric_footer: Lock the app with {biometric} when it goes to the background.
settings.gif_services_desc: Add API keys from GIPHY, Tenor, and Imgur to search and post GIFs in your timeline. Get keys from developers.giphy.com, developers.google.com/tenor, and api.imgur.com.
profile.block_all_warning: Warning: This will block every follower of this account. Use with caution.

info.feature.lists.browse: تصفح قوائم التنظيم والإشراف مع البحث والتصفية المدمجين.
info.feature.lists.bulk: إضافة أو إزالة أو نسخ أو نقل الأعضاء بكميات كبيرة مع تتبع التقدم.
info.feature.lists.import: استيراد المعرفات من النص أو CSV أو الملفات — معاينة قبل التأكيد.
info.feature.lists.export: تصدير قوائم الأعضاء ونتائج المقارنة كملف CSV.
info.feature.compare.compare: مقارنة القوائم وعرض التداخل، فقط-في-A وفقط-في-B.
info.feature.compare.transfer: نسخ أو نقل الأعضاء المحددين بين القوائم بكميات كبيرة.
info.feature.compare.export: تصدير الفروقات للمراجعة دون اتصال أو الأرشفة.
info.feature.export.posts: تصدير منشورات الملف الشخصي بصيغة CSV أو JSON للمراجعة أو المشاركة أو الأرشفة.
info.feature.export.media: تصفح الصور والفيديوهات باستخدام صور مصغرة خفيفة قبل فتح المعاينات الكاملة.
info.feature.export.download: تنزيل الوسائط المحددة إلى مجلد بأسماء ملفات مبنية على وقت الإنشاء مع تقرير أخطاء مختصر.
info.feature.moderation.block: حظر أو كتم من تفاصيل الملف الشخصي مع حوار تأكيد.
info.feature.moderation.block_all: حظر جميع متابعي حساب — يعمل كمهمة خلفية.
info.feature.moderation.membership: عرض وتبديل عضوية قائمة الإشراف مباشرة من أي ملف شخصي.
info.feature.audit.snapshots: لقطات محلية للقوائم عند كل تحميل — قارن أي اثنين.
info.feature.audit.log: سجل العمليات مع إحصائيات النجاح والفشل.
info.feature.audit.pending: ورقة الإجراءات المعلقة تعرض المهام الجارية مع التقدم وإعادة المحاولة.
info.feature.audit.searches: عمليات البحث المحفوظة والحديثة تبقى بين جلسات الاستخدام.
